title: astracantha basianica
intro: Astracantha basianica, also known as Astragalus membranaceus, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family native to China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astracantha basianica include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astracantha basianica can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
